title: Vythisi
description: A texture pack that improves immersion and exploration
body:
This pack is a combination I made using a bunch of nice resource
packs. My goal was to improve the game’s immersion and enhance the
exploration experience. To achieve this, I aimed to add variety to
plants and natural blocks, as well as incorporating detailed elements
and 3D blocks, such as an improved GUI, grass details, and bushy
leaves. Additionally, I fixed some bugs and made the game seem more
consistent through small tweaks, including OptiFine features like
glowing ores, glowing armor trims and animated textures.



As of its first public release, this pack is, in my opinion, complete
enough to really improve your experience. However, I still plan on
adding more, such as improved sounds, item detailing, and overall
enhancements to further enrich this beautiful game.



I won’t update this pack soon, as I am currently
working on another big project that aims to improve mobs.


Using OptiFine is highly recommended as many features can’t work without it.

Texture packs used :
Fire Rekindled (www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fire-rekindled) by Tec

Treeshroom+ (www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/treeshrooms) by Enkera

Lush Icons (www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/lush-icons) and visual leaf decay (www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/visual-leaf-decay) by 6_28318530717958

Chests to pouches (www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/chests-to-pouches) by Entium

Enhanced items (www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/enhanced-items-dripstone-nether-sprouts-amethyst) by _MrMango

Consistent moss (www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/consistent-mossy-blocks-java) by NeraW

Advanced GUI (www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/custom-gui) by Blasjel
